name: software-engineering-project-group-11-individual
description: Group 11 Software Engineering Project - Multi-LLM Chat Application

scripts.test:unit: cd backend && npx jasmine tests/unit/*.test.js || echo 'No unit tests found'
scripts.test:acceptance: cd backend && npx cucumber-js tests/acceptance/features || echo 'No acceptance tests found'
scripts.test:e2e: cd backend && node tests/e2e/puppeteer.test.js || echo 'No E2E tests found'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:acceptance && npm run test:e2e
